scripts.check: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests && npm --prefix site run check
scripts.predeploy: sh -c ': "${PUBLIC_SITE_URL:?Missing PUBLIC_SITE_URL}"; npm run build; gh-pages-clean'
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'if [ -n "${GITHUB_PAGES_CNAME:-}" ]; then gh-pages -d site/dist -b "${GITHUB_PAGES_BRANCH:-gh-pages}" -o "${GITHUB_PAGES_REMOTE:-origin}" --dotfiles --nojekyll --cname "$GITHUB_PAGES_CNAME" -m "Deploy $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)"; else gh-pages -d site/dist -b "${GITHUB_PAGES_BRANCH:-gh-pages}" -o "${GITHUB_PAGES_REMOTE:-origin}" --dotfiles --nojekyll -m "Deploy $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)"; fi'
